title: When I shift a group to another board the ordner changes
excerpt:
Hi Monday Community 
At work I duplicate and shift a lot of groups. 
This problem came up: when I shift a group to another board the order of the items changes completely. It always worked until few days ago. 
Can someon…

posts.author: NathalieMatter (Nathalie Matter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community

At work I duplicate and shift a lot of groups.
This problem came up: when I shift a group to another board the order of the items changes completely. It always worked until few days ago.

Can someone help me?
Thanks

posts.author: Eloise2023 (Eloise Cowlishaw)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having the same issue - this only started happening a few days ago.

Have you worked out how to fix it?

posts.author: NathalieMatter (Nathalie Matter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unfortunately not. I contacted the Monday Support, they said it would be a bug. They’re still working on it…
Its a bit difficult because I use the shifting group action a lot… hope they’ll solve the problem.
